name: agent-doc-rules
description: Reusable documentation and AGENTS.md rules for AI-assisted repositories

scripts.docs:check: agent-doc-rules-docs check && agent-doc-rules-docs-duplicates style && agent-doc-rules-docs-duplicates check
scripts.test:static: corepack pnpm run test:markdown && corepack pnpm run docs:wording && corepack pnpm run test:links && corepack pnpm run test:skill && corepack pnpm run test:e2e-tools && corepack pnpm run test:e2e-command && corepack pnpm run test:audit
scripts.verify:release: corepack pnpm run skills:sync && corepack pnpm run test:install && corepack pnpm test && corepack pnpm run docs:check && corepack pnpm run test:agent
